nasb.text: After him Baruch the son of Zabbai zealously repaired another section, from the Angle to the doorway of the house of Eliashib the high priest.

esv.text: After him Baruch the son of Zabbai repaired another section from the buttress to the door of the house of Eliashib the high priest.

cnv.text: 下一段，就是薩拜的兒子巴錄竭力修築的另一段，從城牆轉角的地方，直到大祭司以利亞實住宅的門口。

ccb.text: 再下一段由萨拜的儿子巴录修筑，他从城墙转角修到以利亚实大祭司的家门口。
